title: Grace period for deleted public Marketplace apps
summary: 1. Sitecore introduces a 30-day grace period for public Marketplace apps after deletion, allowing existing installations to remain accessible during that time.
impact: 2. This update is important as it ensures continuity for users who have already installed the app, providing creators with a smooth transition and the opportunity to manage customer subscriptions effectively.

title: Confirmation dialog when importing a package
summary: 1. Sitecore now includes a confirmation dialog for the Accept Changes button during package imports to enhance user protection.
impact: 2. This improvement minimizes the risk of unintentional changes during dry runs, ensuring more accurate content management.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for May 1, 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore's May 1, 2026 update resolves several key issues in Content Hub, enhancing schema imports/exports, Scripting SDK self-relation accuracy, and overall resource loading logic.
impact: 2. These fixes ensure smoother functionality and improved usability, preventing errors during imports and enhancing the user experience in managing project blocks and public links.

title: Content SDK 2.1 released with lightweight visit tracking, bot detection, and more
summary: 1. Content SDK 2.1 introduces enhancements like lightweight visit tracking, bot detection, and improved Next.js support, along with key bug fixes for better stability and security.
impact: 2. These updates enhance analytics accuracy and overall performance, ensuring safer and more reliable content management in production environments.

title: Regex capture groups in claims mapping
summary: 1. Sitecore now allows the use of regex capture groups in claims mapping, enabling dynamic mapping of external roles to Sitecore roles.
impact: 2. This improvement enhances the flexibility and automation of role assignments, streamlining the integration of external identity claims with Sitecore's security model.

title: The Profiles page now includes live monitoring and an interactive map
summary: **Summary:** The SitecoreAI Profiles page has been updated to include live monitoring features and an interactive map, enhancing the user experience with real-time visitor activity insights.
impact: **Why it matters:** This update enables organizations to better analyze and understand audience behavior through live data and geographical insights, ultimately improving engagement strategies and decision-making.

title: SitecoreAI base image release 1.7.38
summary: 1. The SitecoreAI base image release 1.7.38 enhances performance by enabling parallel processing of CMP entities and introduces several critical fixes and security improvements.
impact: 2. These updates streamline content synchronization, improve user experience during publishing and previewing, and ensure better handling of multilingual content, which is vital for effective content management.

title: Release of SitecoreAI Pathway 1.3 for site migrations
summary: 1. SitecoreAI Pathway 1.3 introduces a beta feature for migrating public HTML sites, enhanced structure file exports, improved mapping, and increased reliability.
impact: 2. This update streamlines the migration process for non-Sitecore sites, providing richer data exports and more robust mapping, which is crucial for seamless website transitions.

title: Improvement in Content Hub for April 28, 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore's April 28, 2026 update enhances graph throughput efficiency in Content Hub.
impact: 2. This improvement boosts performance, enabling faster data processing and better user experiences.

title: Advanced ranking rules and settings in Search experiences
summary: 1. SitecoreAI introduces advanced ranking controls, including boost, bury, and pin rules, along with semantic reranking and fuzzy search functionalities.
impact: 2. These enhancements enhance search result accuracy and relevance, allowing organizations to optimize user experiences on their websites.

title: OrderCloud portal improvements
summary: 1. The OrderCloud portal now features multi-tab support in the API Console, allowing user context to be shared across tabs while keeping impersonation tab-specific, along with custom role group naming.
impact: 2. These enhancements improve user experience and flexibility for developers, making it easier to manage and navigate the API Console.

title: Introducing the Inspect mode in Design Studio
summary: 1. Sitecore has launched an Inspect mode in Design Studio, enabling marketers and content authors to preview and interact with component variants without disrupting their workflow.
impact: 2. This improvement streamlines the inspection process, enhances usability, and separates creation from testing, ultimately increasing efficiency for content management tasks.

title: Improvements and resolved issues in Design Studio
summary: 1. Sitecore's Design Studio update streamlines component management by automatically generating default variants and enhancing the components overview and preview URLs.
impact: 2. These improvements increase efficiency in component setup and management, while ongoing accessibility enhancements boost compliance and user experience.

title: Improvements and resolved issues in Page builder
summary: 1. Page builder updates enhance efficiency with direct access to child items and a new Details section for easier information retrieval, while fixing issues related to alt text and version management.
impact: 2. These improvements streamline the editing workflow, allowing authors to work more seamlessly and maintain context during content creation.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for April 17, 2026
summary: 1. The Sitecore update on April 17, 2026, includes various bug fixes to improve the content importing process, enhance user experience, and ensure proper entity handling.
impact: 2. These resolutions streamline operations, enhance functionality, and improve overall user satisfaction in managing content assets.

title: Excluding HTML tags from search index
summary: 1. Sitecore has enhanced search accuracy by automatically removing HTML tags from indexed HTML string properties, ensuring only visible text is searchable.
impact: 2. This improvement simplifies the search experience, allowing users to find relevant content more easily by focusing on readable text rather than getting hindered by HTML markup.

title: Custom notification messages
summary: 1. Sitecore now allows customization of notification messages for external actions in entity operations, offering options for default or personalized messages and translations.
impact: 2. This enhancement increases flexibility in user communication, ensuring notifications can be tailored to better meet specific user needs.

title: A new glossary section in brand kits enables custom translation in SitecoreAI
summary: 1. SitecoreAI introduces a new glossary section in brand kits for custom translation, allowing users to define approved translations and preserve specific brand terminology during localization.
impact: 2. This update enhances brand consistency and control across translations, ensuring accurate messaging and preserving crucial brand elements in various languages.

title: Improvements and resolved issues in the Page builder
summary: 1. The latest Page Builder update enhances personalization flexibility, fixes component visibility issues, and improves usability features for authors.
impact: 2. These enhancements reduce configuration complexity for developers and streamline the authoring process, promoting a more efficient content management experience.

title: Content mode for faster content creation and search in Page builder
summary: **Summary:** Page builder now features a Content mode for a streamlined, full-screen experience that enhances content creation, searching, and editing efficiency.
impact: **Why it matters:** This update allows authors to work more quickly and effectively with large content structures, reducing the need for navigation and enabling faster content management.

title: SitecoreAI base image release 1.7.5
summary: 1. SitecoreAI base image release 1.7.5 enhances CMP entity synchronization, reduces memory usage, improves logging, and tracks Solr behavior, alongside several bug fixes and an upgrade to Sitecore PowerShell extensions.
impact: 2. These updates enhance performance, reliability, and resource management in SitecoreAI, while the PowerShell upgrade necessitates script validation to maintain compatibility, impacting existing functionalities.

title: Share your Marketplace app ideas and upvote your favorites
summary: 1. Sitecore's Marketplace now allows community members to submit app ideas and upvote their favorites, helping to prioritize development.
impact: 2. This initiative promotes community engagement and empowers users to influence the direction of Sitecore product offerings.

title: Share your Marketplace app ideas and upvote your favorites
summary: **Summary:** Sitecore's Marketplace enables community members to propose and upvote app ideas, allowing teams to influence future developments.
impact: **Why it matters:** This initiative fosters collaboration and ensures that the most desired solutions are prioritized, enhancing the overall Sitecore ecosystem.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for April 3, 2026
summary: 1. The Sitecore update resolved several issues in Content Hub, including validation errors, incorrect display of option lists, and serialization inconsistencies, ensuring smoother entity management and user experience.
impact: 2. These fixes enhance data integrity and usability, making it easier for users to manage and interact with their content without unintended changes or errors.

title: All import jobs now automatically include a backup package
summary: **Summary:** All import jobs in Sitecore now automatically generate a backup package to ensure consistent recovery options.
impact: **Why it matters:** This enhancement simplifies the recovery process for imports, enhancing data integrity and reducing risks during content transfers.

title: AI-assisted field-level text generation
summary: 1. Sitecore introduces AI-assisted generation of alt text for images, enhancing accessibility and SEO features.
impact: 2. This update streamlines content creation for users, ensuring better compliance with accessibility standards and improved search engine visibility.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for April 3, 2026
summary: 1. The April 3, 2026 update for Sitecore Content Hub resolves several validation errors and improves serialization and duplicate detection functionalities.
impact: 2. These fixes enhance user experience by ensuring accurate data handling and permissions, streamlining entity management and visualization settings.

title: All import jobs now automatically include a backup package
summary: 1. All import jobs in Sitecore now automatically generate a backup package for consistent recovery options.
impact: 2. This enhancement ensures better data safety and simplifies recovery processes by eliminating dependency on version discrepancies between source and target environments.

title: AI-assisted field-level text generation
summary: 1. Sitecore introduces AI-assisted generation of alt text for images to enhance accessibility and SEO.
impact: 2. This feature improves user experience and search visibility, making content more inclusive and discoverable.

title: Improvements and resolved issues in the Page builder
summary: 1. The latest Page builder update enhances user experience by allowing authors to rename content items directly in the UI, access the SitecoreAI changelog, and edit items in Link lists, while also improving performance and addressing existing issues.
impact: 2. These improvements streamline content management for authors and enhance efficiency, ultimately supporting better content organization and faster performance in the Page builder.

title: Improvements and resolved issues in the Page builder
summary: 1. The Page builder update enhances user experience with direct content item renaming, a quick link to SitecoreAI changelog, improved editing options, and faster creation from templates, alongside several fixes.
impact: 2. These improvements streamline content management for authors, enhance usability, and boost performance, ultimately leading to a more efficient workflow within Sitecore.

title: Introducing profiles
summary: 1. SitecoreAI has introduced Profiles, allowing users to access and analyze site visitor data directly within the platform.
impact: 2. This feature enhances data-driven personalization by providing detailed insights into visitor behavior and preferences, enabling better customer journey management.

title: JSS 22.12 released with Next.js 16, agent skills, and more
summary: 1. The JSS 22.12 release introduces updates like Next.js 16 and ESLint v9 with flat config support, along with key bug fixes and breaking changes.
impact: 2. This matters as it enhances performance and compatibility for developers using Sitecore JSS, ensuring they have access to the latest features and improvements.

title: SitecoreAI base image release 1.6.1483
summary: **Summary:** SitecoreAI base image release 1.6.1483 enhances memory efficiency, improves CMP import performance, and introduces better logging and API features.
impact: **Why it matters:** These updates optimize system performance and troubleshooting, ensuring smoother content management operations and better resource utilization for users.

title: Introducing profiles
summary: 1. SitecoreAI now introduces Profiles, allowing users to explore site visitor data with detailed insights like heatmaps and session analytics.
impact: 2. This feature enhances audience understanding and personalization efforts by providing actionable insights from visitor data, aiding marketing analysts and administrators in optimizing customer journeys.

title: JSS 22.12 released with Next.js 16, agent skills, and more
summary: 1. JSS 22.12 introduces Next.js 16, agent skills, and significant updates including ESLint v9 and AI coding assistance, along with important bug fixes and breaking changes.
impact: 2. This release enhances functionality and modernizes the framework, making it essential for developers to follow upgrade guides for a smooth transition.

title: SitecoreAI base image release 1.6.1483
summary: **Summary**: SitecoreAI base image 1.6.1483 optimizes memory usage, enhances CMP import performance, and improves cache clearing logging, addressing several defects and inefficiencies in prior versions.
impact: **Why it matters**: These updates enhance overall system efficiency, reduce latency, and improve troubleshooting capabilities, leading to a more reliable and performant Sitecore experience for users.

title: More customizable agents, spaces, and content workflows
summary: **Summary:** The March release of Agentic Studio enhances content workflows by allowing more customizable agents and streamlined management of items and processes.
impact: **Why it matters:** This update increases efficiency and flexibility in content generation and management, enabling users to tailor workflows and utilize agents in more complex, organized ways.

title: Marketer MCP tool name updates
summary: 1. Sitecore has updated Marketer MCP tool names to 60 characters or fewer to enhance visibility and usability across MCP clients.
impact: 2. This change prevents potential errors from long names and ensures consistent referencing of tools in prompts, improving overall user experience.

title: More customizable agents, spaces, and content workflows
summary: 1. The March release of Agentic Studio enhances customization and scalability of content workflows with improved agent functionality, enabling users to build and configure agents for complex tasks and datasets.
impact: 2. This update matters as it empowers users to work more efficiently with content, facilitating bulk operations and integration of various tools and APIs, ultimately improving productivity and flexibility in content management.

title: Marketer MCP tool name updates
summary: **Summary:** Sitecore has updated several Marketer MCP tool names to meet the 60-character limit, ensuring they remain accessible and functional across MCP environments.
impact: **Why it matters:** These changes prevent potential errors from longer tool names being filtered out, ensuring reliable references and consistent usage in prompts.

title: Major update to Sitecore documentation: new platform and improved experience
summary: 1. Sitecore has launched a major update to its documentation, featuring a Markdown-based platform with enhanced viewing options and a modernized user interface.
impact: 2. This update significantly improves the documentation experience, offering flexibility for future AI integration and a more user-friendly navigation and reading environment.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for March 20, 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore's March 20, 2026 update for Content Hub resolves several issues, including import errors, resource inefficiencies, filter inaccuracies, and improves overall functionality with clearer warnings and enhanced features.
impact: 2. These fixes enhance user experience by ensuring smoother data imports, accurate reporting, and reliable workflows, ultimately increasing efficiency and reliability in managing content.

title: Soft delete assets in Scripting and Web Client SDKs
summary: 1. Sitecore now allows soft deletion of assets via the Scripting and Web Client SDKs, enabling easy restoration through new methods in the FinalLifeCycleManager.
impact: 2. This update enhances asset management by offering a reversible deletion process, reducing the risk of permanent loss.

title: The Downloads page has been migrated to React
summary: 1. The Downloads page has been updated to React for improved reliability and maintainability, with Targets and Status columns now displayed as tags.
impact: 2. This migration enhances user experience and simplifies future updates, ensuring better performance and easier management of download content.

title: Link rel and target attributes are now configurable in asset rich text fields
summary: 1. Sitecore now allows configuration of link rel and target attributes in asset rich text fields.
impact: 2. This enhancement improves SEO, security, and user experience by providing greater flexibility in link management.

title: Table headers are now sticky in the table view
summary: 1. Column headers in the Search component's table view are now sticky, remaining visible during scrolling.
impact: 2. This enhancement improves usability for large datasets, reducing errors and making data review more efficient.

title: Content SDK v2.0 released - Next.js 16, agent skills, events, tracking, personalization, and more
summary: 1. Sitecore's Content SDK v2.0 introduces enhancements like AI integration, a new search package, and upgraded frameworks for better performance and developer experience.
impact: 2. These updates empower developers to create more efficient, data-driven applications while simplifying analytics and search functionalities, ultimately enhancing user personalization and engagement.

title: Solved issues in Design Studio
summary: 1. The latest Design Studio release resolves issues related to component generation prompts and duplicates in chat history.
impact: 2. These fixes enhance user experience by ensuring efficient functionality and reducing confusion in AI interactions.

title: Enhanced security for public Marketplace apps
summary: 1. Sitecore has introduced enhanced security measures that allow the suspension of public Marketplace apps if they violate policy, with immediate removal from the Marketplace and all associated organizations.
impact: 2. This change is significant as it strengthens security and compliance for users and organizations, promoting safer app usage and accountability among developers.

title: Sitecore AI base image 1.6.1437 (hotfix)
summary: 1. The Sitecore AI base image 1.6.1437 hotfix resolves issues with datasource workflow actions and reverts changes that caused unnecessary publishing of all pages.
impact: 2. This update is crucial as it restores proper functionality in the Content Editor, ensuring efficient content management without unintended page publications.

title: Faster and more accessible site management in Page builder
summary: 1. The Page builder update enhances site management with faster loading, improved keyboard navigation, and efficient site discovery through paginated site collections.
impact: 2. This matters because it significantly boosts usability and accessibility for users, especially those managing multiple sites, making it easier for everyone, including those using assistive technologies.

title: Unpublish pages to quickly take content offline
summary: 1. Sitecore's Page builder now features an Unpublish option, allowing authors to swiftly take pages offline without deletion while preserving all content versions for future use.
impact: 2. This enhancement streamlines content management, enabling quicker campaign adjustments and reducing the risk of unintended publishing actions.

title: Page builder solved issues
summary: 1. The Page builder update addresses issues with the rich text editor's formatting, eliminates duplicate search results in Editor mode, and clarifies language and field-level fallback values.
impact: 2. These enhancements improve usability for content authors, streamline content management, and ensure clearer communication of content origins.

title: PDF file upload support now available in Brand Assistant
summary: 1. Brand Assistant now supports PDF file uploads alongside images for enhanced content analysis and generation.
impact: 2. This update broadens users' ability to leverage diverse source documents, improving workflows in general queries, brainstorming, and brief generation.

title: Solved issues in Design Studio
summary: 1. The latest Design Studio update resolves issues regarding decimal precision, image visibility in incognito mode, component variant display, and improves reCAPTCHA functionality in Sitecore Forms.
impact: 2. These fixes enhance user experience and ensure consistent data presentation, reducing errors and improving form submission reliability.

title: New Marketer MCP tools for brand kits and brief management
summary: **Summary:** Sitecore's new Marketer MCP tools streamline campaign brief creation by guiding marketers through a conversational flow, integrating brand kits and brief management.
impact: **Why it matters:** This enhancement improves efficiency and consistency in campaign planning, enabling faster movement from ideas to actionable briefs while leveraging AI capabilities.

title: Changes to Message Sender Configuration
summary: 1. Sitecore has updated the Message Sender configuration to require the use of a Delivery Config for improved reliability and performance, while removing certain attributes like URL and SharedKey.
impact: 2. This change enhances system efficiency and necessitates updates to any automated processes creating Message Senders, ensuring smoother operations for users.

title: SitecoreAI base image release 1.6.1437
summary: 1. SitecoreAI base image release 1.6.1437 resolves issues related to unnecessary page publishing, incorrect user access permissions in SXA Toolbox, and retention of the 'updated by' field during migration to SitecoreAI.
impact: 2. This update improves system efficiency and user management while ensuring data consistency during migrations, enhancing overall user experience.

title: Build agentic Marketplace apps by integrating the Marketer MCP
summary: 1. Summary: Developers can now integrate the Sitecore Marketer MCP into full-stack Marketplace apps, allowing marketers to execute marketing actions via natural language prompts.
impact: 2. Why it matters: This feature empowers marketers to efficiently manage and create content using intuitive language-based interactions, enhancing productivity and creativity in content creation.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for March 6, 2026
summary: 1. Content Hub updates for March 6, 2026, address various user interface issues, including bug fixes for asset sharing, report accuracy, and browser compatibility.
impact: 2. These improvements enhance usability and ensure more consistent and reliable user experiences across the platform.

title: M.Project.Block definition changes are now included in packages
summary: 1. M.Project.Block entity definitions are now exported and imported with Sitecore packages.
impact: 2. This update enhances package management by ensuring block definitions are consistently included, improving development efficiency.

title: System insights page security improvement
summary: 1. The System insights page now has independent security settings, separate from the Content effectiveness page.
impact: 2. This change enhances security by ensuring that access controls for the System insights page are not automatically influenced by the Content effectiveness page.

title: Embedding SDK now available for integrating Content Hub asset pickers
summary: 1. The Content Hub Embedding SDK now enables developers to integrate an asset picker for seamless access to Content Hub assets within external applications.
impact: 2. This enhancement improves user experience by allowing users to browse and select assets without disrupting their workflow in other applications.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for 06 Mar 2026
summary: **Summary:** The Sitecore update on March 6, 2026, resolves several critical issues, including import job reports incorrectly flagging unchanged scripts, and various UI and functionality bugs in Content Hub.
impact: **Why it matters:** These fixes enhance the user experience by ensuring accurate data representation and optimal performance of Content Hub features, thereby increasing reliability for users.

title: New Briefs tab in SitecoreAI Campaigns
summary: 1. Sitecore has introduced a new Briefs tab in the Campaigns overview page, enabling centralized access to all associated briefs for efficient navigation and review.
impact: 2. This update enhances team collaboration and streamlines campaign management by allowing quick access to key brief information without leaving the Campaigns interface.

title: Import/Export V2 now includes M.Project.Block definition changes in packages
summary: 1. The Import/Export V2 update adds M.Project.Block entity definition support for package export/import.
impact: 2. This enhancement streamlines package management by ensuring that essential project block definitions are consistently included during the import/export process.

title: AI assisted custom conditions in Personalize
summary: 1. Sitecore now allows users to create AI-assisted custom audience conditions in the Personalize mode of the Page Builder, utilizing server-side JavaScript and the AI Code Assistant for enhanced logic building.
impact: 2. This update streamlines the process of developing advanced personalization strategies, enabling marketers to craft more effective custom targeting without heavy coding requirements.

title: Page builder improvements and solved issues
summary: 1. The Page builder update enhances usability with new features for easier path access and language editing, alongside several issue resolutions for improved functionality.
impact: 2. These improvements streamline the editing process for content editors, minimizing the need to switch between tools and ensuring better content presentation and resource loading.

title: Strengthening Agentic studio with configuration, collaboration, and control
summary: 1. The February update of Agentic studio enhances usability with improved signals, chat functionalities, collaborative spaces, and agent management capabilities, focusing on clearer workflows and better collaboration tools.
impact: 2. These improvements are vital for increasing transparency, reliability, and efficiency in daily operations, ultimately empowering teams to work more effectively and manage workflows with greater clarity.

title: Content SDK 1.5.0 adds support for Design Studio in App Router–based applications
summary: 1. Content SDK 1.5.0 enhances Design Studio support in App Router applications, introducing a secure preview for server components.
impact: 2. This update is significant as it resolves recent rendering issues for AI-generated variants, improving the development experience in Design Studio.

title: JSS 22.11 released with Preview support in Pages for Angular applications
summary: 1. JSS 22.11 introduces Preview support for Angular applications in SitecoreAI, enabling experience validation within Pages.
impact: 2. This update enhances the development workflow by allowing teams to preview changes directly, improving efficiency in validating user experiences.

title: Dedicated web search tool now available in Brand Assistant
summary: 1. Sitecore's Brand Assistant now features a dedicated web search tool for quick access to targeted information within conversations.
impact: 2. This enhancement improves user efficiency by allowing focused searches without navigating away from the chat interface, streamlining content creation and management.

title: Brand Assistant's information sources and writing styles now configurable
summary: 1. Sitecore introduces configurable options for the Brand Assistant, allowing teams to tailor writing styles and information sources to align with their brand's voice and objectives.
impact: 2. This enhancement empowers users with greater control over content generation, ensuring that outputs are relevant and consistent across different contexts and audiences.

title: Resolved issue in Content Hub for February 24, 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore resolved an issue in Content Hub related to forced script cache updates upon relation changes (MONE-55868).
impact: 2. This update enhances the system's efficiency and reliability, ensuring that changes are promptly reflected in the script cache.

title: Introducing support for AI skills APIs in Marketplace apps
summary: **Summary:** Marketplace apps now support the Brand Review REST API, enabling AI-powered content evaluation for on-brand media through SitecoreAI data.
impact: **Why it matters:** This feature enhances content consistency for authors, allowing them to ensure compliance with brand guidelines efficiently, ultimately improving the quality of digital assets.

title: Resolved issue in Content Hub for February 23, 2026
summary: 1. The update resolves a script cache issue in Content Hub related to relation changes.
impact: 2. This fix ensures smoother content management and improved performance when updating relationships in Sitecore.

title: SitecoreAI base image 1.6.1405 release
summary: 1. The SitecoreAI base image 1.6.1405 release addresses various issues, including personalization in Edge Preview and media file migration errors.
impact: 2. This update enhances system performance and reliability, ensuring improved user experience and smoother project transitions.

title: Introducing the external asset picker for content
summary: 1. Sitecore has introduced an external asset picker for the rich text editor, allowing users to insert media from external digital asset management systems (DAM) like Bynder.
impact: 2. This enhancement improves content flexibility and accessibility by enabling users to reference and manage assets from various external sources, streamlining content creation processes.

title: Analytics is now generally available
summary: 1. The Analytics feature has transitioned to general availability, offering insights through the System insights and Content effectiveness pages to track entity performance and link engagement.
impact: 2. This update allows users to gain valuable metrics on content performance and entity management, enhancing data-driven decisions and optimizing user engagement strategies.

title: Resolved issues in Content Hub for 20 Feb 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore's Content Hub update resolves several issues, including enhancements to validation logic, mass edit functionality, and interface display settings.
impact: 2. These fixes improve user experience by ensuring accurate data handling, a consistent layout, and proper rendering, ultimately leading to more efficient content management.

title: Saving AI generated variants is now easier
summary: 1. Sitecore has streamlined the process of saving AI-generated variants by allowing users to install them directly into their repository using the Sitecore CLI.
impact: 2. This enhancement simplifies and speeds up the workflow, making it more efficient for users to reuse AI-generated content in SitecoreAI.

title: Enhanced visibility and control for page items and publishing
summary: 1. Sitecore has enhanced the content tree by allowing users to view and manage referenced items connected to pages, along with offering flexible publishing options.
impact: 2. This update improves content oversight and auditing processes while providing greater control over the publishing of related items, streamlining workflow management for users.

title: Page builder usability improvements and solved issues
summary: 1. The Page builder update enhances usability by displaying available page versions per language and resolves several issues related to permissions and item duplication.
impact: 2. These improvements streamline content management for users, ensuring accurate item representation and effective collaboration by maintaining consistent permissions.

title: Resolved issue in Content Hub for February 11, 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore improved stability and performance of Content Hub search indexing in the February 11, 2026 update.
impact: 2. This enhancement ensures faster and more reliable content retrieval, benefiting overall user experience and efficiency.

title: Introducing search experiences in SitecoreAI
summary: 1. SitecoreAI introduces a new configurable search component that allows users to create dynamic search experiences on their websites.
impact: 2. This feature enhances content discoverability and presentation, enabling better user engagement and more tailored search results.

title: New features for Conversion optimization
summary: 1. Sitecore's latest update introduces enhancements for conversion optimization, including tailored search experiences, audience targeting through affinities, and new analytics dashboards.
impact: 2. These features empower organizations to deliver personalized content, improve user engagement, and gain actionable insights into visitor behavior, ultimately boosting business outcomes.

title: Understand your audience with identity resolution and affinities
summary: 1. SitecoreAI introduces identity resolution and affinities, enabling better audience understanding and more personalized content delivery.
impact: 2. This matters because it allows organizations to engage visitors more effectively by leveraging real-time insights into their preferences and behaviors.

title: New Top affinity condition for Personalize audiences
summary: 1. Sitecore introduces a new Top affinity condition in the AI Page builder for more precise audience targeting based on visitors' strongest interests.
impact: 2. This enhancement allows campaigns to activate content when visitor intent is highest, improving engagement through focused and relevant targeting.

title: Marketplace - Support for the Search Configuration REST API and other API changes in the SDK
summary: 1. Sitecore has added support for the Search Configuration REST API in Marketplace SDK version 0.4, enabling apps to manage search source configurations effectively.
impact: 2. This update enhances the functionality of SitecoreAI APIs, improving how content is indexed and searched, which is crucial for optimizing user search experiences.

title: SitecoreAI base image 1.6.1376 release
summary: 1. SitecoreAI base image 1.6.1376 introduces Allowed Renderings at the Styles parent item level, simplifying style management and ensuring consistency across components while also addressing various bugs.
impact: 2. This update enhances user experience by reducing configuration effort and minimizing errors, thereby improving the overall reliability and performance of the Sitecore platform.

title: Resolved issue in Content Hub for February 9, 2026
summary: 1. Sitecore has improved the stability and performance of search indexing in Content Hub as of February 9, 2026.
impact: 2. This update enhances user experience by ensuring faster and more reliable search functionality within the Content Hub.

title: Upcoming change to CI Hub asset upload configuration
summary: 1. Sitecore is transitioning asset upload configuration from AssetUploadConfiguration to CiHubAssetUploadConfiguration and will copy current settings to the new entity.
impact: 2. This change is important to prevent disruption in asset uploads, but users must update both configurations during the transition period to ensure proper functionality.

title: Introducing the Sitecore Content Hub DAM Connector for Contentful
summary: 1. Sitecore has launched the Content Hub DAM Connector for Contentful, allowing seamless access to approved assets from Content Hub within Contentful.
impact: 2. This integration enhances content management by centralizing assets, improving efficiency for authors and editors in their workflow.

title: In-app notifications are now available for more events
summary: 1. In-app notifications are now expanded to include events such as completed/failed background jobs and task-related updates for greater flexibility.
impact: 2. This enhancement allows users to customize notification preferences, enabling real-time awareness while facilitating later reviews of important events.

title: AI-assisted smart brief generation is now generally available
summary: 1. The AI-assisted smart brief feature has transitioned from beta to general availability, enabling marketers to efficiently create briefs with AI support.
impact: 2. This update enhances productivity by allowing for quicker brief creation and improved content relevance, streamlining the marketing process.
